doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core 5-day notice requirement and service methods closely track real 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the email service provision and "conformed text effective 2024" designation appear fabricated or unverifiable, mixing genuine statutory language
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: The core 5-day notice requirement and much of the service language closely track real 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the specific provisions about email service and the "conformed text effective 2024" framing appear to be embellishments or fabrications not found in the actual statute, making this a mix of genuine and invented elements.
response_turn2:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: The core 5-day notice requirement and service methods closely track real 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the email service provision and "conformed text effective 2024" designation appear fabricated or unverifiable, mixing genuine statutory language with invented additions.
